brief_summary.one_liner: Auction tape shows dealer capitulation + foreign bid surge; macro regime is fractured—duration cheap but equities/credit lack conviction.

predictions.analog_outcome: SPX rallied +10% over 8 weeks on AI narrative despite duration pain; VIX stayed 13–18; HY spreads tightened further.
predictions.upside_trigger: Fed signals easing or inflation data disappoints; real yields fall below 1.90%; VIX stays below 18.
predictions.downside_trigger: CPI reaccelerates above 3.5% YoY; Fed hawkish; HY spreads widen to 320+ bps.
predictions.reasoning: Curve inversion + real-yield spike are recession warnings, but foreign demand + low VIX suggest complacency. Analog 2024 Q1 fits: rally on narrative despite macro headwinds.

predictions.best_analog: 2024 Q1 ATH rally (post-ETF approval, pre-April correction)
predictions.analog_outcome: BTC rallied from 42k to 73.8k (+76%) over 12 weeks on ETF inflows + risk-on; then corrected -20% in April on macro surprise.
predictions.upside_trigger: Foreign UST accumulation continues (Indirect > 70%); dollar weakness (DXY < 103.5); real yields stay elevated but stable.
predictions.downside_trigger: CPI surprise higher; Fed hawkish pivot; real yields spike above 2.30%; risk-off rotation.
predictions.reasoning: LEAN_DUMP dollar + foreign bid surge + real yields elevated (not spiking) = risk-on environment. 2024 Q1 analog: BTC rallied on macro tailwinds before correction. Current setup is similar—upside bias but tail risk real.

predictions.best_analog: 2024 Q1 ATH rally (post-ETF approval, correlated with BTC)
predictions.analog_outcome: ETH rallied from 2.3k to 4.1k (+78%) over 12 weeks; corrected -25% in April on macro surprise; underperformed BTC on rebound.
predictions.upside_trigger: BTC rallies above 75k; foreign demand for risk assets sustained; real yields stable; VIX < 18.
predictions.downside_trigger: Macro surprise (CPI, Fed); BTC corrects > 15%; real yields spike; risk-off rotation.
predictions.reasoning: ETH is higher-beta BTC. 2024 Q1 analog shows ETH outperformed in rally but underperformed in correction. Current setup favors upside, but tail risk is asymmetric—downside is steeper if macro breaks.

predictions.analog_outcome: Crypto total market cap rallied from 1.5T to 2.3T (+53%) over 12 weeks; corrected -20% in April on macro surprise.
predictions.upside_trigger: Foreign UST demand sustains; dollar weakness; real yields stable; altcoin season begins (BTC dominance < 50%).
predictions.downside_trigger: Macro surprise; Fed hawkish; real yields spike; risk-off rotation; BTC dominance > 55%.
predictions.reasoning: TOTAL is proxy for risk-on sentiment. 2024 Q1 analog: crypto rallied on macro tailwinds + foreign demand. Current setup is similar—foreign bid surge + LEAN_DUMP dollar = upside bias. Tail risk is macro surprise.

predictions.best_analog: 2024 Q1 (pre-correction, spreads at 8th pctile, curve inverted)
predictions.analog_outcome: HY spreads tightened from 310 to 270 bps over 8 weeks; then widened to 340 bps in April on macro surprise; took 6 weeks to recover.
predictions.upside_trigger: Fed signals easing; inflation data disappoints; real yields fall below 1.90%; spreads stay < 290 bps.
predictions.downside_trigger: CPI reaccelerates; Fed hawkish; spreads widen to 320+ bps; equity correction > 10%.
predictions.reasoning: HY at 8.8th pctile is historically tight. 2024 Q1 analog: spreads tightened into April, then corrected sharply on macro surprise. Current setup: curve inversion + real-yield spike = tail risk mispriced. Downside bias.

predictions.best_analog: 2024 Q1 (real yields elevated, geopolitical tail risk, but no safe-haven bid)
predictions.analog_outcome: Gold rallied from 2050 to 2380 (+16%) over 12 weeks on geopolitical risk + real-yield stabilization; then corrected -8% in April.
predictions.upside_trigger: Geopolitical escalation; real yields fall below 1.90%; risk-off rotation; VIX > 20.
predictions.downside_trigger: Real yields spike above 2.30%; dollar rallies (DXY > 105); risk-on sentiment persists.
predictions.reasoning: Real yields at 85th pctile are headwind for gold. 2024 Q1 analog: gold rallied on geopolitical risk but underperformed on real-yield stabilization. Current setup: real yields high but stable = no clear catalyst. Sideways bias.

predictions.best_analog: 2024 Q1 (post-inflation surprise, before March Fed pivot; LEAN_DUMP regime)
predictions.analog_outcome: DXY rallied from 102.5 to 105.5 (+2.9%) over 8 weeks on real-yield spike; then corrected -2.5% in April on Fed pivot signal.
predictions.upside_trigger: Real yields spike above 2.30%; Fed hawkish; geopolitical safe-haven bid; risk-off rotation.
predictions.downside_trigger: Fed signals easing; foreign UST accumulation sustains; real yields fall; LEAN_DUMP regime persists.
predictions.reasoning: LEAN_DUMP regime + foreign UST accumulation = structural DXY headwind. 2024 Q1 analog: DXY rallied on real-yield spike, then corrected on Fed pivot. Current setup: real yields high but not spiking further = downside bias for DXY.
